channel.title: Studies in Nonlinear Dynamics & Econometrics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Studies in Nonlinear Dynamics & Econometrics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2024-frontmatter5

item.title: Zero-Inflated Autoregressive Conditional Duration Model for Discrete Trade Durations with Excessive Zeros
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0008

item.title: Investor Sentiment Mining Based on Bi-LSTM Model and its Impact on Stock Price Bubbles
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0028

item.title: Should You Use GARCH Models for Forecasting Volatility? A Comparison to GRU Neural Networks
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0025

item.title: Determination of the Number of Breaks in High-Dimensional Factor Models via Cross-Validation
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0037

item.title: Artificial Neural Networks and Time Series of Counts: A Class of Nonlinear INGARCH Models
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0095

item.title: Commitment Issues: Does the Fed Have an Inflation Incentive to Commit?
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0034

item.title: Volatility Forecasting Using Quasi-Score-Driven Models with an Application to the Coronavirus Pandemic Period
item.description: Article by Astrid Ayala, Szabolcs Blazsek, Adrian Licht DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2022-0085
